testcase.name: test_dispatch_cooldown_skips_second_call

failure.message: AssertionError: second call should be cooldown-skipped, got {'event': 'build_warning', 'members': 1, 'results': [{'user_id': '321dab14-16ec-424a-8ac9-000a3e142e9a', 'results': []}]} assert None == 'cooldown' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf879f4bd19c0>('skipped') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf879f4bd19c0> = {'event': 'build_warning', 'members': 1, 'results': [{'results': [], 'user_id': '321dab14-16ec-424a-8ac9-000a3e142e9a'}]}.get

testcase.failure: tests/test_iter19_notif_dispatch.py:354: in test_dispatch_cooldown_skips_second_call asyncio.run(_impl_dispatch_cooldown_skips_second_call()) /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/runners.py:190: in run return runner.run(main) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/runners.py:118: in run return self._loop.run_until_complete(task) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:654: in run_until_complete return future.result() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/test_iter19_notif_dispatch.py:266: in _impl_dispatch_cooldown_skips_second_call assert r2.get("skipped") == "cooldown", f"second call should be cooldown-skipped, got {r2}" E AssertionError: second call should be cooldown-skipped, got {'event': 'build_warning', 'members': 1, 'results': [{'user_id': '321dab14-16ec-424a-8ac9-000a3e142e9a', 'results': []}]} E assert None == 'cooldown' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf879f4bd19c0>('skipped') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf879f4bd19c0> = {'event': 'build_warning', 'members': 1, 'results': [{'results': [], 'user_id': '321dab14-16ec-424a-8ac9-000a3e142e9a'}]}.get
